# GLKTextureInfo

**Class**

Information about OpenGL textures created by the [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKTextureLoader] class.

## Declaration

```swift
class GLKTextureInfo
```

## Overview

When your app loads textures using the [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKTextureLoader] class, the texture loader returns information about the textures using [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKTextureInfo] objects. Your app never creates [doc://com.apple.glkit/documentation/GLKit/GLKTextureInfo] objects directly.

## Reading Texture Information

- **name**: The OpenGL context’s name for the texture.
- **target**: The OpenGL binding target for the texture.
- **height**: The height of the loaded texture.
- **width**: The width of the loaded texture.
- **textureOrigin**: The location of the origin in the loaded texture.
- **alphaState**: The state of the alpha component in the loaded texture.
- **containsMipmaps**: A Boolean value that states whether the loaded texture contains mip maps.

## Constants

- **GLKTextureInfoAlphaState**: Values that describe the alpha information stored in a source image’s pixel data.
- **GLKTextureInfoOrigin**: The location of the origin in the original source image.

## Instance Properties

- **arrayLength**
- **depth**
- **mimapLevelCount**

## Texture Loading

- **GLKTextureLoader**: A utility class that simplifies loading OpenGL or OpenGL ES texture datas from a variety of image file formats.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSCopying
- NSObjectProtocol
